findings.issue: 「実績」→「实绩」 is acceptable but non-standard; common usage prefers「实际」or「实际进度」
findings.evidence: jp:「予定」と「実績」を記入, zh:「计划」和「实绩」
findings.suggestion: Consider using「计划」和「实际」for broader readability

findings.issue: zh adds「计算」before「公式」; jp simply says「求める式」— minor amplification, not a loss
findings.evidence: jp:「組合せの数を求める式」, zh:「组合数的计算公式」

findings.issue: 「プロジェクトコミュニケーションマネジメント」is a core PMBOK knowledge area term but absent from glossary
findings.evidence: in_glossary=False for jp_surface='プロジェクトコミュニケーションマネジメント'
findings.suggestion: Add to glossary.json entries with first_page=278

findings.issue: 「リスク転嫁」is a core PM risk response strategy but absent from glossary
findings.suggestion: Add to glossary.json entries with first_page=281

summary: Chunk 26 covers pages 272-281: PM knowledge areas (work packages, Gantt, arrow diagram, PERT, critical path, resource mgmt, communications mgmt, combination math, risk strategies). All 10 pages carry PASS verdicts from stage6. 0 CRITICAL findings. 3 WARN findings: (1) zh uses non-standard 「实绩」for 「実績」on p273 (minor style issue, not semantically wrong); (2) 「プロジェクトコミュニケーションマネジメント」absent from glossary on p278; (3) 「リスク転嫁」absent from glossary on p281. 1 INFO: zh mildly amplifies jp「求める式」to「计算公式」on p280. No technical accuracy errors detected. All trilingual definitions are semantically faithful. Release-impacting defects: 0. Glossary gaps are non-blocking but should be addressed.
